options: Access to app resources, services, and app operations

que: When is activity context usually the better choice?
When is application context usually appropriate?
What is a common risk of storing an activity context in a singleton?
Why is application context not always suitable for UI work?
options: It may not carry the right UI/window/theming behavior for a screen

que: Which is a good practice for context usage?
options: Always pass application context for dialogs

que: Which example is a good application-context use case?
options: Accessing shared preferences for app-wide settings
Showing a themed dialog on the current screen
Anchoring a popup to the visible activity window

que: What is a common context mistake?
options: Using activity context for UI behavior
Using application context for long-lived non-UI work
Treating all context instances as interchangeable
